# delegate

**Instance Property**

The delegate of the scroll view.

## Declaration

```swift
weak var delegate: (any BEScrollViewDelegate)? { get set }
```

## Overview

The `BEScrollView` class doesn’t retain the delegate, which must conform to the [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BEScrollViewDelegate] protocol.
title: delegate
